channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Six Suspected Militants Neutralised in Kohat Operation by CTD and Police
item.description: In Kohat district of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, a joint operation by the Counter-Terrorism Department (CTD) and local police successfully eliminated six terrorists, police officials reported. The operation t...

item.title: Reds shine through individual brilliance as Waratahs continue to fall short
item.description: In a hard-fought Super Rugby clash, the NSW Waratahs showed improvement from their heavy defeat to the Hurricanes, yet still went down 26–17 to the Queensland Reds. Despite coach Dan McKellar’s frustr...

item.title: Phil Woolas, former Labour minister, dies aged 66 after brain cancer battle
item.description: Phil Woolas, a former Labour minister known for his forthright style and controversial career, has died at the age of 66 following a battle with brain cancer. Woolas served as Member of Parliament for...

item.title: Philip Acop Elected as Antipolo's New Representative
item.description: Following the passing of his father, Romeo Acop, the Antipolo 2nd District has elected Philip Acop as its new representative. The Commission on Elections (Comelec) officially proclaimed Philip Acop as...

item.title: Trump suggests further US strikes on Iran’s Kharg Island amid ongoing tensions
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump suggested that the United States might carry out additional strikes on Iran’s key oil export hub, Kharg Island, describing the possibility as 'just for fun'. In an int...

item.title: The Accidental Birth and Four-Century Existence of the Republic of Cospaia
item.description: In the 15th century, during the Renaissance, Pope Eugene IV faced financial woes amid church schisms and sold the Borgo Sansepolcro area to Florence for 25,000 gold florins to secure liquidity. Survey...

item.title: North Korea Conducts Tactical Nuclear‑Capable Rocket Drill Amid U.S. Air Defense Shifts in the Region
item.description: North Korea has carried out a large‑scale drill involving multiple 600‑millimeter tactical rocket launchers capable of firing nuclear‑equipped missiles, according to state media reports. The test used...

item.title: Mayon Volcano Activity Remains High with 279 Quakes and Lava Flows
item.description: The Philippine Institute of Volcanology and Seismology (Phivolcs) reported that Mayon Volcano experienced 279 volcanic earthquakes from 12 a.m. on Saturday, March 14, until 12 a.m. on Sunday, March 15...

item.title: Raptors 905 unveil state-of-the-art practice facility in Mississauga
item.description: The Raptors 905, Toronto Raptors' G-League affiliate, officially opened a new 16,000-square-foot practice facility at the Paramount Fine Foods Centre in Mississauga, Ontario. The facility, developed i...

item.title: Kenya's Divided Elite Hinders National Progress
item.description: The article argues that Kenya's elite class is too fragmented along ethnic and regional lines, making it hard for the country to move forward as one. This division weakens national unity and stalls de...

item.title: Study Finds Heavy ChatGPT Use May Reduce Original Thinking Over Time
item.description: One new study from researchers for Peking University and Beijing Yuxin Technology Company show say frequent use of ChatGPT fit affect human creativity. Dem study involve 61 college students wey dem sp...

item.title: West Gate: A Theatrical Depiction of Melbourne’s Deadliest Bridge Collapse
item.description: The Melbourne Theatre Company’s production of 'West Gate' brings to life the 50-year-old tragedy of the West Gate Bridge collapse, which claimed 35 lives. Written by Dennis McIntosh, the play is a fic...

item.title: Flight Operations Disrupted to UAE Amid Iran-US Conflict, Airlines Update Schedules
item.description: Due to the ongoing Iran-US conflict, several Indian airlines including IndiGo and Air India have announced changes to their flight schedules to the United Arab Emirates, especially Dubai. IndiGo has i...

item.title: Filipino Band 1621 Releases Their Latest EP 'Begin'
item.description: Filipino band 1621 has officially released their new extended play (EP) titled 'Begin,' offering fresh tracks to their growing audience. This release showcases the band's evolving sound, blending cont...

item.title: Complete Guide to Applying Online at Mzumbe University for 2026/2027 Intake
item.description: Mzumbe University in Morogoro, Tanzania, is accepting online applications for the 2026/2027 intake for both undergraduate and postgraduate programmes. The university has three campuses: the main campu...

item.title: KZN MEC urges eThekwini to honour Mangosuthu Buthelezi with statue to reflect inclusive liberation history
item.description: KwaZulu-Natal MEC for Co-operative Governance and Traditional Affairs, Thulasizwe Buthelezi, has publicly called on the city of eThekwini and the provincial government to honour the late IFP founder, ...

item.title: Tyler McGregor: Leading Canada’s Para Ice Hockey Team and Advocating for Mental Health
item.description: Tyler McGregor, captain of Canada’s Para ice hockey team, is preparing to lead his team against the United States for gold at the 2026 Paralympics. A native of Forest, Ontario, McGregor has competed i...

item.title: Daily Horoscope Guidance for March 15, 2026
item.description: The Globe and Mail presents a detailed horoscope for March 15, 2026, offering insights for all zodiac signs. Aries are encouraged to seek help despite their usual independence, as support from friends...

item.title: PDP Factions Plan to Harmonize Conditions to Resolve Internal Crisis
item.description: The Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) dey try put their house in order as factions of Oyo State Governor Seyi Makinde and FCT Minister Nyesom Wike dey plan to harmonize conditions to solve di long-standi...

item.title: Delhi NCR experiences light rain and thunderstorms, meteorological department issues 2-day orange alert
item.description: Delhi and the surrounding NCR region experienced light rainfall accompanied by intermittent thunderstorms, causing a temporary relief from the prevailing hot and humid conditions. The India Meteorolog...
